form.advancedHint: Use presets by default; switch to advanced mode only for complex rules.

formHelp.priority: priority: higher value means higher execution precedence.
formHelp.dedupe: dedupeWindowSeconds: within this window, same rule + same subject runs only once.
formHelp.cooldown: cooldownSeconds: after one run, this rule will not trigger again during cooldown.
formHelp.budgetPerDay: attentionBudgetPerDay: max trigger count per day (keyed by rule_id:subject).
formHelp.cronSchedule: Prefer 5-field cron (e.g. 0 9 * * 1-5, */5 * * * *); @every:seconds is still supported for compatibility.

helpCenter.title: Help Center
helpCenter.subtitle: Learn feature usage, hover hints, and critical Channel setup in one place.
helpCenter.searchPlaceholder: Search guides, module pages, and troubleshooting...
helpCenter.searchNoResults: No matching guides found. Try broader keywords.

featureGuide.title: Feature Navigation Guide
featureGuide.subtitle: Hover each entry for detailed usage notes, or click directly to open the page.

hoverTips.title: How Hover Help Works
hoverTips.subtitle: Hover buttons, nav items, and quick entries to see purpose and impact.

items.1: Left navigation: hover to learn each module responsibility and scenario.
items.2: Key action buttons: hover to see what data will refresh or change.
items.3: Configuration entries: hover to learn suggested setup order and risks.

channelTutorial.title: Channel Setup Tutorial (Critical)
channelTutorial.subtitle: For Telegram / Feishu integrations, follow the steps in order.
channelTutorial.openConfigTip: Go to Config > Channel for create, test, and enable/disable operations.
channelTutorial.securityBody: For production, enable approvals, restrict allowedChatIds, and rotate token/secret regularly.

prepare.title: Prepare integration parameters
prepare.description: Collect bot token, webhook callback URL, default agent, and allowed chatId list.

create.title: Create a Channel instance
create.description: Choose Telegram or Feishu in Config, fill base connectivity fields, then save.

policy.title: Set addressing and proactive policies
policy.description: Configure addressingPolicy, proactivePolicy, and contextPolicy to avoid noisy triggers.

test.title: Run connectivity test
test.description: Use "Test" to verify outbound connectivity and confirm status becomes ready.

platformWebhook.title: Configure platform callbacks
platformWebhook.description: Point Telegram/Feishu callback URLs to the corresponding Semibot Runtime endpoints.

observe.title: Verify in Events and Sessions
observe.description: After sending a real message, confirm inbound events and execution results in gateway session details.

noResponse.q: No bot response after sending message in group. What to check?
noResponse.a: Check webhook status, instance enabled state, bot privacy mode, and pending approvals.

notInAllowedChatIds.q: Why are some group messages not triggering?
notInAllowedChatIds.a: Most likely the chatId is not in allowedChatIds, or no available agent is bound.

tokenInvalid.q: Token/secret reported invalid. What should I do?
tokenInvalid.a: Regenerate credentials, update gateway config, and run connectivity test again.

approvalStuck.q: Why is a task stuck waiting for approval?
approvalStuck.a: Go to Approvals to decide it, or reduce risk/approval requirement in tool settings.

feishu.title: Feishu Channel Detailed Setup
feishu.subtitle: For Feishu bot event integration and card-action callbacks.

credentials.title: Prepare Feishu app credentials
credentials.description: Get App ID/App Secret from Feishu platform and fill verifyToken / webhookSecret / bot token in Channel config.

events.title: Configure event callback URL
events.description: Set event subscription URL to /v1/integrations/feishu/events with public HTTPS access and complete platform verification.

cardActions.title: Configure card-action callback URL
cardActions.description: Set card action callback URL to /v1/integrations/feishu/card-actions for approve/reject and other interactive actions.

testAndObserve.title: Test and observe
testAndObserve.description: After saving, run Channel test first, then send messages in Feishu group and verify inbound events plus execution traces.

telegram.title: Telegram Channel Detailed Setup
telegram.subtitle: For Telegram bot webhook integration and group conversation routing.

credentials.title: Prepare bot token and routing defaults
credentials.description: Get token from BotFather, then configure defaultChatId, allowedChatIds, and chatId -> agentId bindings.

setWebhook.title: Set Telegram webhook
setWebhook.description: Point Telegram webhook to /v1/integrations/telegram/webhook and ensure the URL is public HTTPS reachable by Telegram.

privacyAndChatId.title: Check privacy mode and chatId
privacyAndChatId.description: If bot does not reply in groups, verify bot privacy mode, allowed chat_id list, and gateway enabled state.

testAndObserve.title: Integration test and verification
testAndObserve.description: Send test message, then verify chat.message.received in Events and tool execution / reply traces in gateway conversation detail.
